title: Argyrite
description: Unearth the ancient material Argyrite in the dark depths
body:
### Argyrite


![Argyrite Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4bc8b01004acd9be8dc65d136f999ccb1092dcb.jpeg)


## Welcome to Argyrite Mod!
- This mod adds new ingot called Argyrite which is stronger than Netherite.
- To make Argyrite Ingot, you have to find Ancient Argyrite between y-45 to y-60 in the deep dark.
- Then smelt Ancient Debris in the blast Furnace to get Argyrite Scrap.
- Use 4 Argyrite Scrap and 4 Netherite Ingots, to craft one Argyrite Ingot.
- Argyrite Upgrade Template can be obtain by mining Suspicious Sculk, wich is may easy find, between the other sculk because of their green spots.
- To upgrade your Gear, take your Netherite Stuff put it in a Smithing Table, put a upgrade Template and a Argyrite Ingot in, an there you go.
- Argyrite Armor should support Trims.

## Are you ready?

Dive into the mysterious world of **Argyrite**, an ancient material concealed in the shadows of the Minecraft universe. This enigmatic element, escaped from the annals of time, harbors not only incredible powers and possibilities but also a dark history waiting to be unveiled by intrepid adventurers.

The Legend of Argyrite speaks of forgotten civilizations that once harnessed the power of this element to construct their cities and empower their warriors. Yet, with this power came shadows sinister beings emerging from the depths, threatening the world.

With the Argyrite Mod, you can:

- Craft new items and tools from Argyrite, imbued with supernatural properties. Forge a sword that pierces darkness or a helmet that sharpens your senses to uncover hidden secrets.
- Unlock unique abilities that safeguard your survival in the darkness. Perhaps you’ll become faster, invisible, or invulnerable—but beware, every gift has its price.
- Defend yourself against perilous creatures that jeopardize your quest for Argyrite. From shadowy spiders to ancient guardians, the darkness holds many dangers.

Are you ready to descend into the depths and harness the power of Argyrite? The choice rests with you, brave adventurer!



## Includes the following Items:


- Argyrite Scrap
- Argyrite Ingot
- Argyrite Template
- Argyrite Pickaxe
- Argyrite Axe
- Argyrite Hoe
- Argyrite Shovel
- Argyrite Sword
- Argyrite Fishing Rod
- Argyrite Helmet
- Argyrite Chestplate
- Argyrite Leggings
- Argyrite Boots
- Argyrite Block
- Ancient Argyrite
- Suspicious Sculk
- Supsicious Bedrock
- Golden Sweet Berries



To see all recipes use JEI

FAQs

Can I make a modpack with this mod?

Yes, you can.

Can make a addon for this mod?

Shure you can make addons for this mod.

Can I put this mod in other websites?

No, you cannot put this mod on other mod hosting sites.
